calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Sepi Ghafouri, Esq. for Petitioner: Susan Schambeck, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Norton Schambeck, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $25,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $6,250.00
Costs $305.80
A net balance of $18,444.20 to be depositted into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1900 Union St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Oct. 8, 2004
Order to deposit money into blocked account rec'd in court and signed by Judge Marie-Victoire.
